title: Digital Marketing Executive
description:
We are seeking a creative, proactive, and results-driven Digital Marketing Executive to elevate our online presence and strengthen audience engagement. You will play a key role in planning and executing digital marketing initiatives that enhance brand visibility, support business growth, and expand our reach across multiple digital platforms.

Key Responsibilities

Digital Strategy & Campaign Execution

  • Develop and execute digital marketing strategies aligned with company goals.
  • Conduct audience analysis, perform market research, and define KPIs to guide effective campaign planning and optimization.

Social Media Management

  • Manage and grow the company’s social media presence across LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram.
  • Plan, create, and schedule engaging content; oversee community interactions; and monitor performance metrics.
  • Explore and potentially launch a TikTok presence to reach wider audiences.

Content Creation

  • Create visually engaging graphics, videos, and multimedia assets for social media, email marketing, advertisements, and digital campaigns.
  • Work closely with the in-house graphic designer to produce additional visuals when needed.
  • Develop high-quality content for reels, newsletters, and promotional materials that support brand storytelling and audience engagement.

Market & Industry Research

  • Stay informed about trends within the tech and training sectors.
  • Monitor competitor activities and emerging technologies to identify opportunities for innovation and strategic growth.

Business Development Support

  • Collaborate closely with Business Development Managers on marketing-driven initiatives, including events, EDMs, and training newsletters.

Qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
  • 1–3 years of experience in digital marketing or a similar role.
  • Strong understanding of content creation, digital advertising platforms (Google, Meta, TikTok), and analytics tools.
  • Proficiency in basic graphic design and video editing using Canva, CapCut, and Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).
  • Strong communication skills, creativity, and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and adapt quickly in a fast-paced environment.

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Benefits:

  • Health insurance

Work Location: In person

postedCompany.description:
TRAINOCATE is one of the most trusted IT and human capability development training providers in Asia.  We are passionate about providing our customers with the most relevant industry-recognized certifications and courses that will propel them to the pinnacle of their careers.

With more than 20 years of experience under our belt, TRAINOCATE’s specialty is in the purveyance of vendor specific technologies and certifications, high-end IT solutions, customized and bespoke content as well as a robust portfolio of business and management skills delivered via a range of convenient modalities.

At TRAINOCATE, we are strong advocates of lifelong-learning as knowledge and skills gained ensures competitiveness and survivability in the dynamic workplace.  We thrive when our customers unlock their potential through learning goals and we strive to always thoroughly understand their needs and requirements to ensure an optimal learning experience.
postedCompany.name: TRAINOCATE (S) PTE. LTD.
